name: Kindergarten Metalwork & Jewelry — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for beads, clasps with adult support, and wearable-art sharing. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with beads, clasps with adult support, and wearable-art sharing.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: beads, clasps with adult support, and wearable-art sharing
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about beads, clasps with adult support, and wearable-art sharing through a close look at beads, clasps with adult support, and wearable-art sharing.

activities.title: A close look at beads, clasps with adult support, and wearable-art sharing
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at beads, clasps with adult support, and wearable-art sharing, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in beads, clasps with adult support, and wearable-art sharing.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
